claim: All gathered evidence is sufficient to support PRD readiness. No assumptions are presented as facts. All evidence paths are usable and verified. Unresolved missing data is correctly reflected as empty arrays.

evidence.summary: buildBoundarySnapshot() and diffBoundarySnapshots() functions exist and implement hash-based mutation detection
evidence.why: Verifies explorer and cross-checker evidence for core boundary audit mechanism

evidence.summary: Runtime implementation shows boundary snapshots taken before/after execution and blockers created on violations
evidence.why: Confirms actual execution-time boundary audit that gates PRD readiness

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_RESULT_SCHEMA_DEFINITION requires scope field and VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES defines valid values
evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues() validates scope against VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES and creates EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Confirms validation layer that rejects evidence without proper scope classification

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues() requires file locators for project-scoped evidence and creates PROJECT_EVIDENCE_PATH_REQUIRED blockers
evidence.why: Verifies validation that prevents project facts without concrete file evidence

evidence.summary: inspectDemandPrdReadiness() checks evidence agent results and calls scope/path validation functions
evidence.why: Confirms readiness validation loop that gates PRD on complete evidence

evidence.summary: buildProviderInvocation() passes --allowedTools and --disallowedTools to Claude agent CLI
evidence.why: Verifies tool access controls that can restrict agent write capabilities

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross_checker, and verifier roles with protocols
evidence.why: Confirms three-agent architecture for cross-check validation

evidence.summary: execution_policy defines project_mutation as forbidden with allowed_write_roots
evidence.why: Verifies policy-level boundary declaration controlling agent tool access

evidence.summary: buildDemandEvidenceAgentPrompt() includes explicit boundary rules in agent instructions
evidence.why: Confirms agent-level boundary enforcement through prompt engineering

assumptions: Explorer and cross-checker assumptions about external systems (SHA-256 reliability, git ls-files accuracy, agent provider compliance) are properly separated from facts and do not affect core claim verification
risks: Documented risks about edge cases (symlinks, hash collisions, provider non-compliance) are appropriate and do not block PRD readiness for the core claim

result.notes: All evidence paths verified. Explorer and cross-checker results align with no conflicts. Assumptions properly separated from facts. Missing arrays correctly empty. Evidence validates claim that YOLO demand evidence dispatch implements multi-layered boundary audit with snapshot-based mutation detection, scoped evidence validation, and PRD readiness gating.
